## Results
**make fast-ci failed** with exit code 2.
### Summary
The CI suite ran with mixed results:
**Passed:** - Lint (ruff): All checks passed - Format check (ruff format): 1666 files already formatted - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Unit tests (erk): 5899 passed in 23.27s - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.59s - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.90s - Tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed

The Prettier formatting issue is blocking the CI completion. All tests and linting checks passed, but three markdown files need reformatting.
